-  kCMVideoCodecType_VP9 

Global Variable# kCMVideoCodecType_VP9

A type that identifies the VP9 format.iOSiPadOSMac CatalystmacOStvOSvisionOSwatchOS

```
var kCMVideoCodecType_VP9: CMVideoCodecType { get }
```
